subject: fix(builder): hex validation, short hex tint, new form title, user feedback
body:
Fixes from code review:

- Hex color validation now rejects invalid lengths (5/7 digits). Only accepts
  3, 4, 6, or 8 hex digits per CSS spec.
- --form-primary-light CSS variable now normalizes short hex (#abc → #aabbcc)
  before appending alpha, preventing broken tint colors.
- New form title uses pendingTitle from store instead of hardcoded 'Untitled
  Form', so user renames before first save are preserved.
- Publish/unpublish failure now shows a dismissible error banner (auto-clears
  after 5s) instead of silently failing.
- Copy-link failure now shows "Copy failed" feedback instead of no response.
- PageTabs condition indicator uses optional chaining instead of non-null
  assertion for safer access.

Tags: bugfix, theme, ux, builder
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
